records.required_data: actor session; module permission; module records; field masking profile; audit timeline for detail/action
records.required_states: loading; empty; ready; validation_error; access_denied; server_error
records.required_components: PageHeader; StatusBadge; Table/CardList; ActionPanel; AuditTimeline; EmptyState; ErrorState
records.must_not_show: raw private file URL; provider payload; raw OMR; answer key unless authorized; other-school records
